_description: Canonical agent metadata — hooks read from here instead of hardcoding names
_schema_version_notes: v3 (AOC v1): adds verdict_agents_schema declaring per-agent allowed_verdicts/allowed_results/required_structured_fields. hard_gates add pass_clean/pass_after_fixes predicates alongside v2 predicates. See .claude/patterns/agent-output-contract.md. v2: adds non_fixer_agents, recovery_forbidden, lead_merge_aggregate_agents; hard_gates use structured predicates. See .claude/patterns/agent-trace-protocol.md.
_verdict_agents_schema_docs: AOC v1 per-agent vocabulary. Each entry declares the allowed verdict values (AVS v1 core: pass/fail/blocked/unresolved) and allowed result qualifiers (clean/fixed/partial/degraded/skipped/none/count_summary/null). count_summary agents MUST emit required_structured_fields; gates key on those fields via additional_block_conditions in hard_gates[]. R1 coherence rule enforces that lib-verdict.sh predicates and agent .md files stay consistent with this table.

traces.missing_error: design-critic.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
ux-journeyer.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-defender.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-attacker.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
solve-critic.json trace not found -- cannot validate change challenge (solve_depth=full)

_hard_gates_docs: Rules block verify-report-gate from allowing hard_gate_failure:false when ANY of them fires. v2 gates use structured predicates (see _hard_gates_predicate_docs) that make recovery an audit marker validated by evidence, not a blanket fail trigger.

_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_clean: AOC v1: verdict == pass AND result == clean AND provenance == self. Agent found nothing to do (no work performed).
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_after_fixes: AOC v1: verdict == pass AND result in {fixed, partial} AND provenance == self AND unresolved_critical == 0. Agent found issues and resolved all non-critical; criticals are zero.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_pass_or_fail: verdict in {pass,fail} AND provenance == self. For agents where a recorded fail is acceptable as long as it was self-reported.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_strict: verdict == pass AND provenance == self. For agents where anything but a clean self-reported pass requires investigation.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.validated_fallback: provenance in {recovery, self-degraded} AND recovery_validated == true. Acceptable replacement for pass_self_* when evidence confirms the verdict. AOC v1: also accepts #1042 fixture short-circuit self-degraded traces (degraded_reason='demo-mode-fixture-short-circuit').
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.aggregate_ok: provenance == lead-merge AND contributing_spawn_indexes present AND each contributing sibling trace satisfies either pass_self_* or validated_fallback.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.legacy_pass_no_recovery: verdict == pass AND recovery != true. Backward-compat predicate for traces missing provenance (pre-migration). Drops after legacy migration completes.

hard_gates._block_explanation: Blocked unless AOC v1 pass_clean/pass_after_fixes, or v2 pass_self_pass_or_fail / validated_fallback (also covers #1042 fixture short-circuit via self-degraded + recovery_validated) / aggregate_ok, or legacy_pass_no_recovery (pre-migration).

additional_block_conditions._legacy_note: Pre-AOC-v1 partial-as-verdict shape; retained until legacy traces migrated.

hard_gates._note: security-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — recovery provenance is refused by write-recovery-trace.sh. Only self / self-degraded / lead-merge paths are reachable. AOC v1: fail+partial with unresolved_critical>0 is the blocking shape; pass+partial with criticals=0 passes via pass_after_fixes.

additional_block_conditions._legacy_note: Pre-AOC-v1 partial-as-verdict shape; retained until legacy traces migrated.

hard_gates._note: quality-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — see security-fixer note.

_legacy_hard_gates_v1: The v1 block_rules form is preserved below only for reference during migration. Do not read from it — verify-report-gate.sh reads hard_gates (v2) above.
